Bash(python3 -c "
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins import registered_names
names = registered_names\(\)
print\('Registered plugins:', sorted\(names\)\)

Bash(python3 -c "
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins import _load_all, registered_names
_load_all\(\)
names = registered_names\(\)
nature_names = ['deep-abyss', 'storm-sea', 'dark-forest', 'mountain-stars', 'beach-lighthouse']
cosmic_names = ['aurora-borealis', 'nebula-nursery', 'binary-rain', 'wormhole']
for n in nature_names + cosmic_names:
    status = 'OK' if n in names else 'MISSING'
    print\(f'  {n}: {status}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins import registered_names
names = registered_names\(\)
exotic = [n for n in names if n in \('neon-rain','volcanic','crystal-cave','spider-web','snow-globe'\)]
mech   = [n for n in names if n in \('clockwork','coral-reef','ant-colony','satellite-orbit','starfall'\)]
print\('exotic registered:', exotic\)
print\('mechanical registered:', mech\)
print\('total plugins:', len\(names\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins import registered_names
names = registered_names\(\)
print\(f'Total registered plugins: {len\(names\)}'\)
for n in sorted\(names\):
    print\(f'  {n}'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "from hermes_vision.app import GalleryApp; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins.industrial import *
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins.whimsical import *
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins.hostile import *
from hermes_vision.themes import build_theme_config
from hermes_vision.scene import ThemeState
for name in ['factory-floor','pipe-hell','oil-slick','circuit-board','lava-lamp','maze-runner']:
    config = build_theme_config\(name\)
    state = ThemeState\(config, 120, 40, 42\)
    for _ in range\(10\):
        state.step\(\)
    print\(f'{name}: nodes={len\(state.nodes\)} edges={len\(state.edges\)} OK'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins.cosmic import *
from hermes_vision.theme_plugins.nature import *
from hermes_vision.themes import build_theme_config
from hermes_vision.scene import ThemeState
for name in ['aurora-borealis','wormhole','binary-rain','dark-forest','mountain-stars','beach-lighthouse','storm-sea']:
    config = build_theme_config\(name\)
    state = ThemeState\(config, 120, 40, 42\)
    for _ in range\(10\):
        state.step\(\)
    print\(f'{name}: nodes={len\(state.nodes\)} edges={len\(state.edges\)} OK'\)
" 2>&1)
